phrases.intent_en: Ask where the monumental fountain is
phrases.cultural_note: A fonte renascentista é o marco histórico mais fotografado do bairro.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica no centro exato da praça.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo eh-ZAH-too DUH PRAH-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is in the exact center of the square.

responses.english: Good morning, it is in the exact center of the square.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo eh-ZAH-too DUH PRAH-suh.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica no centro exato da praça.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find cork crafts
phrases.cultural_note: Cork crafts are a traditional Alentejo product, often sold in local shops.

likely_response.local: Nas lojas perto do Arco de Giraldo.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUHSH LOH-zhuhsh PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo DIH zhee-RAHL-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: In the shops near the Arco de Giraldo.

responses.english: In the shops near the Arco de Giraldo.
responses.phonetic: NUHSH LOH-zhuhsh PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo DIH zhee-RAHL-doo.
responses.french: Nas lojas perto do Arco de Giraldo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy cork crafts
phrases.cultural_note: A cortiça é um material típico português, muito valorizado localmente.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, as lojas ficam nas arcadas laterais.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, UHSH LOH-zhuhsh FEE-kuhng NUHSH uh-ruh-KAH-duhsh luh-tih-REYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the shops are in the side arcades.

responses.english: Good morning, the shops are in the side arcades.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, UHSH LOH-zhuhsh FEE-kuhng NUHSH uh-ruh-KAH-duhsh luh-tih-REYESH.
responses.french: Bom dia, as lojas ficam nas arcadas laterais.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the weekend market stalls are
phrases.text_local: Onde é o mercado de rua ao sábado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-dee eh oo mer-KAH-doo deh ROO-ah ow SAH-bah-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: Weekend markets are popular in Évora for local produce and crafts.

likely_response.local: Na praça do Giraldo ao sábado.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH PRAH-suh DOO zhee-RAHL-doo OW SAH-buh-doo.

responses.phonetic: NUH PRAH-suh DOO zhee-RAHL-doo OW SAH-buh-doo.
responses.french: Na praça do Giraldo ao sábado.

phrases.text_local: Pode indicar-me onde ficam as Arcadas do Giraldo?
phrases.cultural_note: Arcadas referem-se às galerias comerciais históricas que rodeiam a praça.

likely_response.local: Ficam mesmo na Praça do Giraldo, junto à fonte.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuhng MEHZH-moo NUH PRAH-suh DOO zhee-RAHL-doo, ZHOONNG-too AH FOHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: They are right on Praça do Giraldo, next to the fountain.

responses.english: They are right on Praça do Giraldo, next to the fountain.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuhng MEHZH-moo NUH PRAH-suh DOO zhee-RAHL-doo, ZHOONNG-too AH FOHNG-tih.
responses.french: Ficam mesmo na Praça do Giraldo, junto à fonte.

phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as Arcadas do Giraldo?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-cahm ahz ar-KAH-dahs doo zhee-RAHL-doo
phrases.cultural_note: The Arcadas do Giraldo are iconic arcades surrounding the square.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o restaurante mais próximo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHN-dee FEE-kah oo res-tow-RAN-tee MICE PRAW-see-moo

likely_response.local: Pergunte no balcão de informações perto do arco.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the information desk near the arch.

responses.english: Ask at the information desk near the arch.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo.
responses.french: Pergunte no balcão de informações perto do arco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the weekend market stalls are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as bancas do mercado de fim de semana?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kow AHSH-BAN-kahsh (link: AHSH-BAN) doo-meh-KAH-doo jee-FEENG jee-seh-MAN-ah (link: JEE-SEH)
phrases.cultural_note: O mercado dominical reúne produtores locais e artesanato regional.

likely_response.local: Ficam na Praça de Giraldo, perto do Arco.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuhng NUH PRAH-suh DIH zhee-RAHL-doo, PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: They are at Giraldo Square, near the Arch.

responses.english: They are at Giraldo Square, near the Arch.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuhng NUH PRAH-suh DIH zhee-RAHL-doo, PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo.
responses.french: Ficam na Praça de Giraldo, perto do Arco.

phrases.text_local: Qual restaurante típico perto da praça central recomenda?
phrases.pronunciation: kwal-hes-tow-RAN-chee TEE-pee-koo PEHR-too dah PRAH-sah sen-TRAWL heh-koo-MEN-dah

likely_response.local: Pergunte no balcão de informações turísticas perto do Arco de Giraldo.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo DIH zhee-RAHL-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the tourist information desk near the Arco de Giraldo.

responses.english: Ask at the tourist information desk near the Arco de Giraldo.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH too-REESH-tee-kuhsh PEHR-too DOO AH-ruh-koo DIH zhee-RAHL-doo.
responses.french: Pergunte no balcão de informações turísticas perto do Arco de Giraldo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy cork crafts
phrases.cultural_note: Cork crafts are a popular souvenir from the Alentejo region.

likely_response.local: Nas lojas de artesanato nas Arcadas do Giraldo.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUHSH LOH-zhuhsh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too NUHSH uh-ruh-KAH-duhsh DOO zhee-RAHL-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: In the craft shops in the Giraldo Arcades.

responses.english: In the craft shops in the Giraldo Arcades.
responses.phonetic: NUHSH LOH-zhuhsh DIH uh-ruh-tih-zuh-NAH-too NUHSH uh-ruh-KAH-duhsh DOO zhee-RAHL-doo.
responses.french: Nas lojas de artesanato nas Arcadas do Giraldo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find Évora DOP cheese
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar queijo de Évora DOP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR KAY-zhoo DIH EH-voo-ruh DAWP?
phrases.cultural_note: O queijo DOP é um produto gastronómico com denominação de origem protegida.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the monumental fountain is
phrases.cultural_note: The Fonte Monumental is a landmark fountain in the main square.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Fonte Monumental.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH FOHNG-tih moo-noo-mayng-TAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Monumental Fountain.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Monumental Fountain.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH FOHNG-tih moo-noo-mayng-TAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Fonte Monumental.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Giraldo Arch is
phrases.text_local: Desculpe, onde fica o Arco de Giraldo?
phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW AH-ruh-koo DIH zhee-RAHL-doo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Giraldo Arch is a prominent landmark in Évora, often used as a meeting point.

likely_response.local: Ao fundo da praça, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW FOONNG-doo DUH PRAH-suh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the square, on the right.

responses.english: At the end of the square, on the right.
responses.phonetic: OW FOONNG-doo DUH PRAH-suh, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Ao fundo da praça, à direita.
